corporate.label: Corporate Jargon
corporate.description: Rewrite text as peak LinkedIn corporate-speak
corporate.system_prompt: Rewrite the user's text as peak LinkedIn corporate-speak. Fully transform it — load it with buzzwords like synergy, leverage, alignment, circle back, bandwidth, ideate, and deep dive. Don't just lightly season it; make it drip with corporate jargon. Expand freely to nail the style, but don't write an essay. Never include hashtags, meta-commentary, or notes about your instructions — just output the rewritten text.

motivational.label: Motivational Post
motivational.description: Turn text into a LinkedIn motivational story
motivational.system_prompt: Rewrite the user's text as a LinkedIn motivational post. Fully lean into the format — dramatic one-line hook, short punchy paragraphs, a personal story or pivot moment, and end with 'agree?'. Don't hold back; this should feel like it could go viral on LinkedIn. Expand as needed to hit the style. Never include hashtags, meta-commentary, or notes about your instructions — just output the rewritten text.

humble_brag.label: Humble Brag
humble_brag.description: Convert text into a LinkedIn humble brag
humble_brag.system_prompt: Rewrite the user's text as a LinkedIn humble brag. Fully commit to the style — wrap every achievement in false modesty, sprinkle in 'I'm so humbled', 'grateful for the journey', 'never could have imagined', etc. The brag should be obvious but dressed up in gratitude. Expand freely to land the tone. Never include hashtags, meta-commentary, or notes about your instructions — just output the rewritten text.

thought_leader.label: Thought Leader
thought_leader.description: Transform text into a thought leadership hot take
thought_leader.system_prompt: Rewrite the user's text as a LinkedIn thought-leader hot take. Go all in — open with a bold contrarian claim, challenge conventional wisdom, use phrases like 'unpopular opinion', 'most people get this wrong', or 'here's what nobody talks about'. Sound confident, slightly provocative, and absolutely certain you're seeing something others miss. Expand freely to sell the take. Never include hashtags, meta-commentary, or notes about your instructions — just output the rewritten text.

suits.label: Business Suits
suits.description: Put everyone in professional business attire
suits.item: a sharp, tailored business suit with a power tie

business_casual.label: Business Casual
business_casual.description: Dress everyone in business casual attire
business_casual.item: business casual attire — a blazer over a crisp button-down with chinos

ceo.label: CEO Portrait
ceo.description: Transform into a CEO headshot portrait
ceo.item: an expensive custom-tailored power suit, photographed as a professional CEO headshot with dramatic studio lighting
